verbs.name: accept
verbs.summary: apply a queued proposal to its target zone; requires the author capability

verbs.name: audit
verbs.summary: Query the audit log with optional filters.

verbs.name: blame
verbs.summary: Annotate audit rows for a key with the git commit that introduced each file state.

verbs.name: boot
verbs.summary: Return the orientation contract: zones, entries, schemas, write_flows, agent_quickstart.

verbs.name: capabilities
verbs.summary: Machine-readable contract surface: every verb, its transports, and arg schema.

verbs.name: deps
verbs.summary: List the keys a derived entry depends on (its projection/external sources).

verbs.name: doctor
verbs.summary: Run health checks on the textus store and report any issues.

verbs.name: get
verbs.summary: Read one entry — a pure on-disk read annotated with a freshness verdict; never ingests (quarantine freshness is reconcile + hook only, ADR 0089). Returns the envelope (uid, etag, _meta, body, freshness).

verbs.name: list
verbs.summary: List keys filtered by zone and/or prefix.

verbs.name: propose
verbs.summary: Write a proposal to the role's propose_zone. Auto-prefixes the key.

verbs.name: published
verbs.summary: List all entries that declare a publish_to target.

verbs.name: pulse
verbs.summary: Delta since cursor — changed entries, stale, pending proposals, doctor summary.

verbs.name: put
verbs.summary: Create or update an entry. Schema-validated. Returns {uid, etag}.

verbs.name: rdeps
verbs.summary: List the derived entries that depend on a key (reverse deps / impact set).

verbs.name: reconcile
verbs.summary: Run the convergence pass: produce derived + stale intake, then drop/archive aged entries; report health.

verbs.name: reject
verbs.summary: discard a queued proposal without applying it

verbs.name: where
verbs.summary: Resolve a key to its zone, owner, and path without reading the body.
